text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Just as I'm walking by the dance studio...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
One, two, three! Right hand and then...
left hand? After that is... um...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Cross my... legs!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ahhh!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Holy smokes! That was quite the tumble!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
You saw that, Teio?! This is so
embarrassing!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I saw everything! You're practicing
dancing for your winning concerts, right?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! If it's dancing you need help with,
look no further than the invincible dance
master!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
You'll help me?! Oh, thank you,
Tei—Master Teio!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Leave it to me, Spe! Now watch closely.
This is my legendary Teio Step!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
And that's it! Pretty simple, right? The
part you're having trouble with can be
solved by...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Whoop, doop, alley-oop!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Whoop, doop, alley-oop? I see! I'll try
that!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Whoop! Doop! Alley... oop!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, wait. Something's not right. It's
less of a whoop and more of a shwoop!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Shwoop! Hahaha!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'm so sorry. It's just your teaching is
kinda funny!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Huh, really?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Well, genius can manifest in peculiar
ways!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though the peculiar way of teaching
makes Special Week laugh, she takes
the lesson seriously.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Sigh... This is fun, but I still don't think I have the hang of it.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'm still not great at running either. No
matter how far I go, it's never enough.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I have a long way to go before I become
the top racer in Japan.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Even though this is all a lot of fun, I...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I feel like I'm just wasting time.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hey, hey, hey! Spe! Don't you know why
we even have winning concerts?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Um... Actually, I really don't. Is it so we
have a reason to get first place?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Heh! Well, I know! Prez gave me a hint!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: The reason is...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Now, now, Teio. One should find the
answer by themself.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Prez!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Special Week. Finding your own reason
is what's important.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Look within yourself and question why
you perform.
President! Okay, I will!
